arts.ttl: Ancelotti: "We want to continue in the fight for LaLiga"
arts.sum: We're all hurting, as are the fans, after being knocked out of such an important competition where the club has enjoyed great success in recent years, but these things happen in football. We've had time to prepare and we want to continue in the fight for LaLiga tomorrow."

arts.ttl: Cafu opens Brazil's doors to Ancelotti: "If he comes, he will be welcome"
arts.sum: It's a big question mark whether the coach is going to go to the Brazilian national team. If he comes to Brazil, welcome, mister," Cafu said
